tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Could Have.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Could Have का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I could have done this earlier. You could have told me. He could have done this work easily. We could have arrived on time. She could have taken this opportunity.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Could Have.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Could Have का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: You could have avoided this mistake. They could have won. I could have helped you. He could have told the truth. We could have made it better.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "तुम मुझे कॉल कर सकते थे।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "We coulds have arrived on time."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: We could have arrived on time.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Could Have.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Could Have का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I could have gone there. They could have stopped it. You could have come earlier. He could have read this book.
